REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1152, 1154, 1156 Green Street)
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Baulsier (Counsel for Dorothy Powers, Executor).

After submission of a new Inventory & Appraisement, announcement of the proposed sale in court by Ms. Baulsier, and no overbids having been made, sale of the real property was confirmed in the amount of $1,770,000. No additional bond is required. The Oder for same was signed in open court.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
